help.title: Gameplay Help
stats: Very low hunger makes your pet hungry. Use food items to recover it.
Mood affects sleep and interaction rewards. A good mood can earn hearts.
Low cleanliness adds stress. Use cleaning actions or care items to recover it.
Energy limits play, work, and focus. Sleep or some items can restore it.
Low health blocks Pomodoro and some actions. Use care actions or medicine to recover.
actions: Play raises mood, but spends energy and hunger. Weather and repeated interaction can change the result.
Clean raises cleanliness and a little health, with extra changes from weather, seasons, and achievements.
Work earns coins. Rewards can be affected by level, weather, seasons, boost cards, and achievements.
Sleep restores energy faster and may settle sleep, dreams, or natural-wake rewards.
Inventory items can feed, gift, care for your pet, or plant and boost things in the garden.
other: The shop sells food, gifts, care, and garden items. You can claim free Gubi Crisps daily and exchange coins for hearts.
Daily wishes and return tasks grant rewards after completion. Offline time may also leave diaries or events.
Pomodoro cycles focus and breaks. Completed focus grants coins and mood, while poor status pauses the timer.
The garden lets you unlock slots, plant trees, water, fertilize, and harvest. Clear withered trees to plant again.
Achievements track care, shop, inventory, garden, and Pomodoro progress, rewarding coins, items, boosts, or CGs.
Birthdays, anniversaries, festivals, and yearly reviews can grant special rewards; weather and seasons lightly affect daily actions.
Settings include save management, language, audio, and mods. Mods can replace visuals/text and add safe custom items.
